ALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.description: Whenever you use a Potion, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP and [green]1[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.flavor: The water of life distilled to its purest form.
ALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.title: Aqua Vitae
ALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Infuse[/gold] a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.flavor: It has opinions about which page matters.
ALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.title: Auric Seal
ALCHEMIST-EVERFLOWING_CHALICE.descriptio: At the start of each combat, procure a random potion. If your potion slots are full, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} instead.
ALCHEMIST-EVERFLOWING_CHALICE.flavor: However much you pour, it never quite runs dry.
ALCHEMIST-EVERFLOWING_CHALICE.title: Everflowing Chalice
ALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.description: Whenever a card is created in combat, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
ALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.flavor: A stone that makes stubborn things flow.
ALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.title: Flux Stone
ALCHEMIST-GILDED_KIT.description: You may [gold]Brew[/gold] at Rest Sites. Whenever you use a potion, heal [green]6[/green] HP and gain [green]1[/green] [gold]Strength[/gold]. Potions can be sold to the [blue]Merchant[/blue] for [gold]Gold[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-GILDED_KIT.flavor: An ornate case. The gold is not for show.
ALCHEMIST-GILDED_KIT.title: Gilded Kit
ALCHEMIST-GLOWING_SHARD.description: [gold]Poison[/gold] is triggered against enemies [blue]1[/blue] additional time.
ALCHEMIST-GLOWING_SHARD.flavor: The glow outlasts everyone who admires it.
ALCHEMIST-GLOWING_SHARD.title: Glowing Shard
ALCHEMIST-MIDAS_FRUIT.description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Unripe Fruit[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-MIDAS_FRUIT.flavor: Midas grasped poorly, but he planted well.
ALCHEMIST-MIDAS_FRUIT.title: Midas Fruit
ALCHEMIST-SNAKE_TAIL.description: The first time [gold]Poison[/gold] would reduce your HP to 0, heal to [green]33%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).
ALCHEMIST-SNAKE_TAIL.flavor: No serpent has ever died of its own bite.
ALCHEMIST-SNAKE_TAIL.title: Snake Tail
ALCHEMIST-WEATHERED_KIT.description: You may [gold]Brew[/gold] at Rest Sites. Whenever you use a potion, heal [green]3[/green] HP. Potions can be sold to the [blue]Merchant[/blue] for [gold]Gold[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-WEATHERED_KIT.flavor: Battered, stained, and still faintly warm.
ALCHEMIST-WEATHERED_KIT.title: Weathered Kit
